title: astragalus compactus subsp. albifolius
intro: Astragalus compactus subsp. albifolius, also known as the white-leaved milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus compactus subsp. albifolius can be prepared as a herbal supplement in the form of capsules, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
